description: Yardi provides software for real estate operations, including property management, leasing, marketing and related data services. Its products include Voyager, RentCafe, Matrix and Virtuoso for multifamily, commercial and other real estate markets.
summary: Yardi publicly references proprietary HTTP integration APIs for RentCafe and Voyager/Interfaces, but its public site does not expose machine-readable specs, base URLs, or concrete authentication mechanics; no public GraphQL, CLI, or MCP connect endpoint on yardi.com was found.
